ema_fast.name: Fast Exponential Moving Average
ema_fast.comment: EMA fast = ta.ema(close, length=n) with n = FAST_TREND_LOOKBACK

ema_slow.name: Slow Exponential Moving Average
ema_slow.comment: EMA slow = ta.ema(close, length=n) with n = SLOW_TREND_LOOKBACK

rsi.name: Relative Strength Index
rsi.comment: RSI = ta.rsi(close, length=n) with n = MOMENTUM_LOOKBACK

tsi.name: True Strength Index
tsi.comment: TSI = ta.tsi(close, length=n) with n = MOMENTUM_LOOKBACK

close_zscore.name: Z-score of Close
close_zscore.comment: Z-score of Close = ta.zscore(close, length=n) with n = MOMENTUM_LOOKBACK

efficiency_ratio.name: Efficiency Ratio
efficiency_ratio.comment: ER = change / volatility; change = abs(close - close.shift(n)); volatility = sum(abs(close - close.shift(1))) over n periods; with n = MOMENTUM_LOOKBACK

macd_signal.name: Moving Average Convergence Divergence Signal
macd_signal.comment: MACD Signal = ta.macd(close, fast=12, slow=26, signal=9)

macd_hist.name: Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram
macd_hist.comment: MACD Hist = ta.macd(close, fast=12, slow=26, signal=9)

ppo_signal.name: Percentage Price Oscillator Signal
ppo_signal.comment: PPO Signal = ta.ppo(close, fast=12, slow=26, signal=9)

ppo_hist.name: Percentage Price Oscillator Histogram
ppo_hist.comment: PPO Hist = ta.ppo(close, fast=12, slow=26, signal=9)

ulcer_index.name: Ulcer Index
ulcer_index.comment: Ulcer Index = ta.ui(close, length=n) with n = MOMENTUM_LOOKBACK

cmo.name: Chande Momentum Oscillator
cmo.comment: CMO = ta.cmo(close, length=n) with n = MOMENTUM_LOOKBACK

mb.name: Middle Bollinger Band
mb.comment: Middle Bollinger Band = ta.sma(close, length=n) with n = TREND_LOOKBACK

std.name: Standard Deviation
std.comment: Standard Deviation = ta.stdev(close, length=n) with n = TREND_LOOKBACK

ub.name: Upper Bollinger Band
ub.comment: Upper Bollinger Band = ta.sma(close, length=n) + 2 * ta.stdev(close, length=n) with n = TREND_LOOKBACK

lb.name: Lower Bollinger Band
lb.comment: Lower Bollinger Band = ta.sma(close, length=n) - 2 * ta.stdev(close, length=n) with n = TREND_LOOKBACK
